Intraday post (12/Jan)

Weekly post:

January OpEx week quant breakdown | Weekly post (12-16/Jan) - FREE

Last weekly post upside target was hit.

The weekly post is entirely free. It contains the key levels, and expected dynamics and my derivation of sentiment from the vol markets.

Let’s look at the daily positioning…

INTRADAY POST Coding today’s positioning:

The net speed profile is positive, customers are selling upside vol and buying downside vol. But upside vol selling is 3x of the downside vol bid. Upside vvol is also sold.

The centroid of the profile is at 6949.58, into noon it acts as a line in the sand.

Downside pivot is at 6915.86target is 6866.93 that is locally sticky.However 6900 is relatively hard to break locally, and there is a ~40% chance that it would provide a reversion back up to 6925/30 and pin there.

Upside pivot is at 6962.83target is 6973.94(due to the vvol selling the expected momentum is narrow). The zone is magnetic, if spot holds above the 6940/50 zone (centroid).

The highest chance is a pin to 6925/30, with a potential reversion. Market is waiting for the datas. However, market doesn’t really fear left-tail. It sees any downside moves as a dip-buying opportunity. Please, re-read the weekly post.

OptionsDepth Heatmap
